nodes.label: Sanad Preview Screenshot
nodes.description: Preview screenshot of the Sanad legal app dashboard. Shows the main 'Today' (اليوم) daily operations view in RTL Arabic. Greeting 'مساء الخير، أحمد.' confirms the user persona is Ahmed. Contains a today's priorities panel with three action items (follow-up on NDA signing, two client updates for Gulf Pharmacies), a 'Start Focus' CTA button, and a right-side navigation sidebar. Top bar has dark mode toggle, EN language switcher, refresh, search, and role-switching buttons (طالب/Student and محامي/Lawyer). Bottom bar confirms PWA installation and home-server optimization. Sidebar items: Today, Dashboard, Clients, Cases Board, Communications, Documents, Invoices, Compliance (badge:4), Tasks (badge:9), Deep Work, Calendar.

properties.tagline: سند — لوحة العمليات اليومية للمحامين والمنشآت الصغيرة في السعودية

nodes.label: Sanad Daily Operations / Today View
nodes.description: The 'Today' landing view of Sanad that aggregates daily priorities for a lawyer. Shows AI-generated or manually curated action items (e.g. follow-up NDA, client updates), a focus-start CTA, and badge counts on sidebar items for urgent attention (Compliance:4, Tasks:9). Acts as the daily command center.

nodes.label: Sanad Sidebar Navigation
nodes.description: Right-aligned RTL sidebar navigation. Items: Today (active), Dashboard (لوحة التحكم), Clients (العملاء), Cases Board (لوحة القضايا), Communications (الاتصالات), Documents (المستندات), Invoices (الفواتير), Compliance (الامتثال, badge 4), Tasks (المهام, badge 9), Deep Work (العمل العميق), Calendar (التقويم).

nodes.label: Lawyer / Student Role Switch
nodes.description: Top navigation bar contains a dual-mode role toggle between 'محامي' (Lawyer) and 'طالب' (Student). In the screenshot the Lawyer mode is active (highlighted). This maps to separate views: DashboardView / CasesView for lawyers vs StudentView for students.

nodes.label: Sanad PWA / Home Server Feature
nodes.description: Bottom bar confirms: app is installable as a PWA (Progressive Web App) for desktop access, and is optimized for a home server. Footer text: 'محسن للخادم المنزلي · PWA مفعل'. Supports offline-first daily access.
